task_description: Replace all Pexels image IDs with verified Nigerian/African fashion photos matching each design title. Fix the broken hero image (404), replace About section with seamstress photo, and ensure all images show Black African/Nigerian models in appropriate Nigerian clothing.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation passes (zero errors). Vite production build succeeds. All 14 new Pexels image IDs verified to return HTTP 200 from the CDN. Hero image fixed (was 404), About section now shows seamstress/designer photo, and all 12 design images replaced with Nigerian/African fashion photos.
